commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: reproduce LDEV-227 to LDEV-229
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: reproduce LDEV-227 to LDEV-229

This is a for test only patch

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,REQFAIL=100,PTLDEBUG=-1,SUBSYSTEM=-1,DEBUG_SIZE=300,TIMEOUT=10,SERVER_FAILOVER_PERIOD=600 \
mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
clientjob=lustre-b2_7_fe ossjob=lustre-b2_7_fe mdsjob=lustre-b2_7_fe \
clientbuildno=34 ossbuildno=34 mdsbuildno=34 \
clientdistro=el6.7 ossdistro=el6.7 mdsdistro=el6.7 \
clientarch=x86_64 ossarch=x86_64 mdsarch=x86_64 \
clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 \
testlist=replay-single,replay-single

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,REQFAIL=100,PTLDEBUG=-1,SUBSYSTEM=-1,DEBUG_SIZE=300,TIMEOUT=10,SERVER_FAILOVER_PERIOD=600 \
mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
clientjob=lustre-b2_7_fe ossjob=lustre-b2_7_fe mdsjob=lustre-b2_7_fe \
clientbuildno=31 ossbuildno=31 mdsbuildno=31 \
clientdistro=el6.7 ossdistro=el6.7 mdsdistro=el6.7 \
clientarch=x86_64 ossarch=x86_64 mdsarch=x86_64 \
clientcount=4 osscount=2 mdscount=2 mdtcount=1 austeroptions=-R failover=true iscsi=1 \
testlist=replay-single,replay-single

Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <wei3.liu@intel.com>
Change-Id: I96903d7dd3b05ae75aa132645d549cadf58cca58
